channel.title: AI Engineering on Shehao Li
channel.description: Recent content in AI Engineering on Shehao Li

item.title: Author Copilot Narrative Editing and Evaluation Platform
item.description: Live interactive narrative product built around an Author Copilot editing loop, a stateful Play runtime, and end-to-end author -> publish -> play evaluation.

item.title: About
item.description: Background, experience, and focus areas for Shehao Li in AI agent systems, LLM engineering, and backend systems.
